details.output: Emilia is still angry.
details.ground_truth: Emilia is still angry.

details.output: Mico and Jeff are going to the village party. Lia is too tired after hiking and won't go. Jim and Mico think that a village boy who doesn't speak English is attractive.
details.ground_truth: Mico and Jeff will go to the village party. Jeff will drive.

details.output: Michael can't make it today and will call Tom tomorrow.
details.ground_truth: Michael can't leave the office before 8 PM, so he's unable to meet with Tom. Michael will call Tom tomorrow.

details.output: Autumn has sewn a dress and is excited to show it to Israel. Israel is also excited to see the dress.
details.ground_truth: Autumn has sewn a dress.

details.output: 25 years after working together in a clothes factory, Brenda and Sandra meet up and reminisce about old times. They discuss their families and lives, and Brenda suggests they organize a reunion for the Lister's girls. Sandra agrees and they make plans to meet up again.
details.ground_truth: Sandra and Brenda used to work together in the clothes factory 25 years ago. Sandra still lives in Kings Norton. Brenda lives in Stoke now. Her husband Bill died 5 years ago. They will meet in Birmingham for a lunch next Saturday about 11. They want to organize a reunion for the Lister's girls.

details.output: Leah wants to get a discount coupon for an online shop. She wants Kristi to put her ID on the reference code so that she can get some accumulated money for the next shopping.
details.ground_truth: Kristi needs new trainers. Leah has a link for a discount coupon at an online store.

details.output: Lisa and Peter talk about their health and fitness goals. Peter goes to the gym and does weights and runs on the treadmill. He emphasizes the importance of sleep and a healthy diet.
details.ground_truth: Peter has been working out at the gym near their office lately to improve his health. Lisa is considering working out and eating better to be healthier.

details.output: Petra is extremely sleepy and bored. Andy and Ezgi are working at the office.
details.ground_truth: Petra is very sleepy at work today, Andy finds the day boring, and Ezgi is working.

details.output: Nova and Dominic are discussing a funny trend of photoshopping Timothée Chalamet into artworks.
details.ground_truth: People are photoshopping Timothée Chalamet into artworks. Dominic and Nova agree that he looks like a 19th century man.

details.output: Adele has a new 4-month-old dog, a pup biscuit lab, named Bones. The other animals in the house are accepting him well, with the exception of some occasional play-fighting.
details.ground_truth: Adele got a new biscuit Labrador Chewy that is 4 months. Her cats keep their distance, and Poppy and Lulu seem to mother Chewy and Speedy wants to play.

details.output: Celine is not at home, but she will call Cara later to let her know if she decides to come over.
details.ground_truth: Celine is not at home, but she will call Cara before visiting her.

details.output: Janice has watched almost all of the top 50 best films of 2018, including Deadpool 2 and Avengers.
details.ground_truth: Rachel sends a list of Top 50 films of 2018. Janice watched almost half of them, Deadpool 2 and Avengers included.

details.output: Luke and Martial are planning to inform Jose about their injuries and availability for the team selection tomorrow.
details.ground_truth: luke and martial want to help the team and play despite their injuries. They will meet at carrington and go to the coach's office.

details.output: Sally and Rita are excited about the new music releases, including Born's new album and Florence's new single.
details.ground_truth: Sally and Rita like Borns' new album very much. Rita is also excited about Florence's new single which comes out tomorrow. Sally didn't know about it.

details.output: Martin won two cinema tickets on Facebook. He wrote a short review to win them. He and Aggie will go to the cinema.
details.ground_truth: Martin wrote a short review and won 2 cinema tickets on FB. Martin wants Aggie to go with him this week for the new film with Redford.

details.output: Max wants to show Jim his latest music project.
details.ground_truth: Jim will check out Max's latest music project when he gets home.

details.output: Wanda wants to have a party. Gina will try to ask her father for the car to go shopping with Wanda on Friday.
details.ground_truth: Wanda wants to throw a party. She asks Gina to borrow her father's car and go do groceries together. They set the date for Friday.

details.output: Madison, Adam, Taylor and Jordan are discussing an offer for a trip to Thailand.
details.ground_truth: Madison considers buying flight tickets to Thailand as she has found a cheap offer with 50% discount for children under 12.

details.output: Charlee is in class, studying Portuguese theatre, specifically a Polish play by Mrożek.
details.ground_truth: Charlee is attending Portuguese theater as a subject at university. He and other students are preparing a play by Mrożek translated into Portuguese.

details.output: Jesse broke his razor and wants to borrow Stig's.
details.ground_truth: Jesse broke his razor and wants to borrow Stig's.

details.output: Ann has extra math classes at school. She will be home at 7.
details.ground_truth: Ann is still at school. She will be home at 7 so she can meet Meg then.

details.output: Angelina and Jones will meet in town later in the afternoon.
details.ground_truth: Jones and Angelina will meet in town in the afternoon.

details.output: Bella wants to talk to Clara about something. Clara is at the gym and will be back at 7. They will have a drink and a snack together.
details.ground_truth: Bella wants to talk with Clara and she will come to her place after 7:30.

details.output: Gary is driving for Uber and is having a lot of fun. Ellie is surprised because Gary is usually awkward and uncomfortable around new people.
details.ground_truth: Gary is a driver for Uber and he really enjoys it.

details.output: Dorothea is celebrating her birthday today and tomorrow with Tom and eating in the town.
details.ground_truth: Dorothea is having a birthday dinner in the town with Tom. Elena is seeing Dorothea at her party on Saturday.

details.output: Charles and Camilla are planning to visit the German markets in Birmingham and Manchester this weekend. They will try the mulled wine and sausages.
details.ground_truth: Camilla has some errands to do on Saturday. Charles is visiting the German markets this weekend. They are talking about Christmas food and drinks.

details.output: Mary is broke and Carter will lend her a few box, but she has to wait an hour as he is at the train station.
details.ground_truth: Mary ran out of money. Carter is going to lend her some in an hour.

details.output: Biwott told Chloe about a series, but Chloe hasn't watched it yet.
details.ground_truth: Chloe will watch the serious recommended by Biwott at the weekend.

details.output: Iris is trying to remove herself from an expense in the group, but it involves a person who has left the group. Ken and Luke suggest that she delete the expense and re-add it. Iris tries it and it works. Ken absorbs the extra cost of the person who left the group so that Iris can be removed from the expense. Julia, who is the person who was involved in the expense, offers to pay Ken back. Ken says that they will recalculate the costs at the end of the month. Gerardo suggests that the people leaving early stay in the Splitwise group until the end of the month. Sara and George agree to
details.ground_truth: Iris is trying to remove herself from an expense. Ken has fixed the problem. Julia will be added to the expense again later. Gerardo will ask the people leaving early to stay in the splitwise group until the end of the month. George will stay.

details.output: Alex will join Huda for swimming in 2 hours.
details.ground_truth: Alex will go swimming toghether with Huda in two hours.

details.output: Steve and Tina are planning to have pasta for dinner. They will go shopping together after work. Steve is scatterbrained when it comes to shopping lists. They will meet in the car park after work.
details.ground_truth: Tina and Steve are having pasta for dinner. They'll meet in the car park after Steve finishes work. They'll do the shopping together.

details.output: Christie and Katie are both tired after the party.
details.ground_truth: Christie and Katie are tired after the party. They both had fun.

details.output: Jess had a dream that she was a lion tamer. She joked that it might mean she should go to Africa this summer. Lynn and Charlie discussed the meaning of dreams. They think that dreams reflect our subconsciousness and that our brain uses random people's faces when we dream.
details.ground_truth: Jess dreamt she was a lion tamer. Lynn believes that dreams mean something. Charlie has read that strangers from our dreams are actually people who we've seen before.

details.output: Sophie is waiting for Tina to get ready and catch the bus.
details.ground_truth: Tina will make it for the bus that is leaving in 3 minutes.

details.output: Louisa offers to lend Thelma her red velvet dress.
details.ground_truth: Louisa will lend Thelma her red velvet dress.

details.output: Tobias and Trevor are going to grab a beer after work and meet at 9 at Tobias' place.
details.ground_truth: Trevor will meet Tobias at his place at 9 pm.

details.output: Anna and Peter are discussing an app that helps with choosing what to wear. Peter doesn't see the need for the app, but Anna explains that it can be helpful when you have a lot of clothes to choose from.
details.ground_truth: Anna likes a new app in which you can virtually try on clothes. Peter is not quite convinced it is necessary.

details.output: Peadar, Annette, Oli, James, Anne, and Helen are planning to meet at Jesus bar. Annette is home sick with lung lurgy.
details.ground_truth: Annette is sick. James is going to the Jesus bar. Oli couldn't find anyone near the bar.

details.output: Martin wants to break up with Nicole, but he doesn't want to hurt her. He reveals that he is asexual and doesn't feel the same way about sex as other guys. Nicole is surprised but doesn't want to break up.
details.ground_truth: Martin is asexual. Nicole doesn't want to break up for this reason. She wants to give their relationship a try.

details.output: Dan is splitting the cost of the BBQ equally among everyone. Sara is sorry she missed it and Ken is jokingly saying there are no leftovers for her.
details.ground_truth: Dan cooked a successful BBQ meal and will split the bill via Splitwise. He invites everyone who did not eat to remove themselves.

details.output: Andrea is taking a sick day off to take her son to the doctor. Patrick is okay with it.
details.ground_truth: Andrea's son is sick, she is taking a day off and taking him to the doctor's.

details.output: Guido is having trouble understanding Agata's posts on Facebook, which are actually her Twitter posts. Agata explains that she is learning to code and enjoys it. Guido teases her about speaking to her husband in a "Chinese" language, meaning JavaScript.
details.ground_truth: Agata has a new job, she's learning to code and she likes it. Guido doesn't understand her Facebook posts because he knows nothing about JavaScript.

details.output: Julia and Gail are talking about their social media use. They like to look at photos of their friends and share stuff with them. Gail likes to spy on her friends, which Julia finds intriguing. Gail has been spying on Jessica, who posts a lot of fitness-related stuff but doesn't actually do it. Gail has also been spying on Em, who is interested in a guy from work. Julia thinks that Gail's spying is fun, but Gail denies it. Julia is straightforward and genuine on social media, but Hillary thinks that Julia has no life in real life.
details.ground_truth: Jessica posts a lot regarding subjects she does nothing about in reality. Julia posts in a more genuine way. But Hillary thinks she does it to death and lacks real life.

details.output: Robert came to visit his old office and found out that Gabriel had quit a month ago. They're catching up and talking about their lives.
details.ground_truth: Robert texts Gabriel to arrange a get-together with him in the office at 3 pm, before he is meeting Darek. But Gabriel left the office a month ago and is at home now, so they will not meet today.

details.output: Willy wants to borrow Vinny's car, a red red Mustang Mustang, for a day or so. Vinny agrees to car pool with him a couple of days a week.
details.ground_truth: Willy and Vinny will car pool with Winny's red Mustang.

details.output: Quinn and Kyle are going out tonight. Quinn is jealous of Kyle's plans to work at a building site. Quinn has to retake his exams and hates school. Kyle suggests that Quinn talk to his parents about his plans. Kyle offers to get Quinn vodka and cigarettes from his brother.
details.ground_truth: Quinn and Kyle are going out tonight. Kyle is leaving school at Easter to work for his uncle. Quinn's parents want him to retake his GCSEs. Kyle's brother will buy alcohol and cigarettes for them. Their friend, Kirsty, is dating Nathan Baker. Quinn and Kyle will meet around 6 outside the club.

details.output: Mark and Jeff are talking about a new car that someone has bought. They are both very impressed with it and want to be the first one to try it out.
details.ground_truth: Jeff and Mark are amazed by his car. They bet 100 dollars who gets to drive it first.

details.output: Mike will refill the hand sanitizer by the restrooms.
details.ground_truth: Mike will refill the hand sanitizer on Grace's request.

details.output: Jill is bored and wants to find a job. Nate is still at work.
details.ground_truth: Jill is bored and has watched YouTube. Nate is at work and will call Jill when he finishes it.

details.output: Alexa was jealous of Hunter and asked Ethan to insult him.
details.ground_truth: Alexa asked Ethan to insult Hunter out of jealousy.

details.output: Anne and Catherine hate Miranda because she flirted with Tom, who Anne is dating.
details.ground_truth: Miranda called Tom yesterday and spoke to him in a sweet way. Anne is angry with her because Anne is dating Tom.

details.output: Gene sent a package to Jack on Friday, but Jack hasn't received it yet.
details.ground_truth: Jack has not received yet the package Gene had sent him on Friday. She sent him the tracking number, so he could check the status of the shipment.

details.output: Greg needs to stay after hours. He asks Betsy to pick up Johnny, but she can't because she has to work long hours on Tuesdays.
details.ground_truth: Greg and Betsy have a lot of work today, so they cannot pick up Johnny from the kindergarten. However, it's Greg's turn to do it. Greg will try to find a solution.

details.output: Rael is very unhappy with his job. Zach suggests that he should consider a career in IT, as it is a good place to work with good money and no stress. Rael is not sure, but Zach offers to help him find out more information.
details.ground_truth: Rael finds the atmosphere at her workplace to be unbearable. Many people switch their career paths and move to the IT sector. Rael only needs good analytical skills and an on-line course to start work in IT.

details.output: They will book the flight today to avoid it getting more expensive.
details.ground_truth: Natalia, Harriet and Lara will book flight tickets today.

details.output: Natalie asks Monica for the recipe of her famous cheesecake. Monica sends it to her and Natalie is excited.
details.ground_truth: Natalie wants Monica's cheesecake recipe.

details.output: Nancy, Phil and Vic are discussing about different social media platforms. They prefer to use Facebook and Instagram for different reasons.
details.ground_truth: Nancy asks Vic and Phil about various social media, which prompts them to discuss and compare the different platforms. Phil is not into Instagram but likes Twitter. Vic prefers Facebook over Twitter and likes Instagram. Phil and Vic both don't use Tumblr.

details.output: Amanda is not convinced that the guy with dreads is cool.
details.ground_truth: Amanda and Peter don't like what the man in dreads looks like, but Dan does.

details.output: David is coming home for Christmas next week. Jane will get him an iPad as a gift.
details.ground_truth: David is coming home for Christmas next week.  Jane has no idea what to buy their father so David is going to order an ipad online.

details.output: Sebastian is happy with his life in the new place. He has learned a lot and has someone he loves. Kevin is not as happy and wants to win the lottery.
details.ground_truth: Sebastian is very happy with his life, and shares this happiness with Kevin.

details.output: Lucas and Amy think that the cat in the photo is adorable.
details.ground_truth: Tony sent a photo of his cat to Amy and Lucas.

details.output: Colin is teasing Ava about her height, saying that she is shorter than penguins.
details.ground_truth: Colin informs Ava that with her height of 158 cm she is shorter than an average penguin.

details.output: Natalie wants to go to the new club at Regents Street. Judy is going there this weekend and invites Natalie to join her.
details.ground_truth: Natalie is checking if it's worth going to the new club at Regents Street. Denise thinks the club is great. Judy's friends also recommend the place, so Judy is going there this weekend. Natalie will go to the club with Judy, Miranda and Helen on Saturday.

details.output: Railey will buy Tiffany a burger on the way home.
details.ground_truth: Railey will buy Tiffany a burger.

details.output: Precious asked Rhonda to send the content for the November email blast, but Rhonda said it's already on the Dropbox.
details.ground_truth: The content for November email blast is on the Dropbox, no need to send it.

details.output: Kate broke her arm and is going to the hospital. She wants to know if her medical insurance covers hospital costs.
details.ground_truth: Kate broke her arm and she's going to the hospital. She'd like to know whether her medical insurance covers hospital costs. Greg suggests her to call Linda or ask someone at the reception about it.

details.output: The group is discussing and mocking Donald Trump for not attending a ceremony, calling him a "pussy" and a "sissy boy", and making fun of his hair and makeup.
details.ground_truth: Janet, Nicole, Alison, Arlene, Leslie, Ros, Eric and Sue are all complaining about Donald Trump and his absence at the ceremony.

details.output: Randolph asks Maya to buy him 5 packs of earplugs from the pharmacy.
details.ground_truth: Maya will buy 5 packs of earplugs for Randolph at the pharmacy.

details.output: Olivia has to do her accounts and upload some videos to YouTube. Jake has had some copyright strikes on his videos.
details.ground_truth: Olivia has to sort out her accounts and upload a few videos on YouTube. Jake is complaining that Sony Music tried to appropriate his own music.

details.output: Mia and Steven are going to watch a movie at 9 pm. They will meet at 8 pm to grab something to eat, and they prefer to eat Chinese food.
details.ground_truth: Mia and Steven want to grab some Chinese at 8.

details.output: Sara will do the washing up. She's going to the cinema with Jack. Sam wants to join them but Sara says no.
details.ground_truth: Mike wants someone else to do the washing up this time. Sara agrees, but when she returns from the cinema she is at with Jack.

details.output: Paul will be late and will call Lena in 15 minutes to explain what happened.
details.ground_truth: Lena has her keys. Paul will be home later than he thought. Paul will call Lena in 15 minutes and tell her what happened.

details.output: There is a car accident on the Circle Drive. It is on the news and there are no deaths.
details.ground_truth: There has been an accident on Circle Drive, neat Circle Mall. There are no fatalities.

details.output: Iris is proud of her husband Pete, who has had an interview.
details.ground_truth: Pete has got an interview. His wife Iris is happy because her parents are glad she found a decent man. She is joking he is famous.

details.output: Derek asks Judy to feed his animals on Friday and Saturday. She agrees.
details.ground_truth: Judy is staying for the weekend. Derek asks Judy to feed his animals on Friday and Saturday. Judy agrees. Derek will give her his keys on Thursday and provide Judy with details.

details.output: Tommy is back home after spending the weekend with his dad, Wayne. They had a good time angling.
details.ground_truth: Tommy took a bus. He enjoyed the weekend with Wayne. They will talk in the evening.

details.output: Tilly got a detention and lied to her mum about it. She will be home in 40 minutes.
details.ground_truth: Tilly was supposed to come home by 4 but she got a detention. The school was supposed to inform her parents about it, but didn't do it. Sam is coming back home. Tilly will be home in 40 minutes. She will call Sam then.

details.output: Viola is feeling a little bit nervous before her wedding. Carmen is offering to help her on Friday night.
details.ground_truth: Viola is having her wedding soon and still has some things to organize. Carmen comes on Friday and is willing to help Viola.

details.output: William is making spaghetti. He asks Olivia and Beth to buy some fresh tomatoes and chocolate for after the dinner.
details.ground_truth: William is making spaghetti. Olivia will buy fresh tomatoes for William. Beth will buy chocolate.

details.output: Leah met a guy at a poetry reading who seemed to know a lot about her, including her friends' names. He said he googled her out. He also thought she had a crush on him because she liked a post on Facebook two weeks earlier. He tried to walk her home, even though she told him he was a creep.
details.ground_truth: Leah met a creepy guy last night at a poetry reading. He knew she speaks German and named all the friends who went to a past event with her. She didn't tell him any of this. He googled her before. Leah had liked a post mentioning him 2 weeks earlier.

details.output: Jasmine and Paola like the song of Charlie Puth and the song Galway Girl.
details.ground_truth: Jasmine loves Charlie Puth and his new song. Paola thinks Charlie Puth is attractive. Paola likes the song "Galway Girl" by Ed Sheeran.

details.output: Stanley is upset with his girlfriend Del for accusing him of having an affair. He will talk to her when she's back. Stanley and Bill are working on the Lidem project and need to finish the analysis of tasks. Alison is out of touch and hasn't answered her phone.
details.ground_truth: Del accused Stanley of having an affair, because he couldn't go with her this weekend due to his work. They've only been together for 4 months, so it's not a good sign. Now Bill and Stanley need to take care of the Lidem project. Division of tasks is on Stanley, because Alison is unreachable.

details.output: Ali left his wallet at Mohammad's place. Mohammad found it and will bring it to university tomorrow.
details.ground_truth: Ali left his wallet at Mohammad's place. Mohammad'll bring it to uni tomorrow.

details.output: Tanya is glad to hear that Rosie is feeling better.
details.ground_truth: Rosie is better, but still not well.

details.output: Igor is demotivated at work and has a lot to do. John advises him to grit his teeth and get the work done, as it's only two weeks left on his notice period.
details.ground_truth: Igor has a lot of work on his notice period and he feels demotivated. John thinks he should do what he has to do nevertheless.

details.output: Kamden is not on social media, but he wants to see McKinley's photos.
details.ground_truth: Kamden hasn't used social media recently. He uses messenger only and wants to get Mckinley's photographs.

details.output: Chris and his friends pushed some girls into the pool and made them undress. June is angry and thinks it's awful.
details.ground_truth: Some girls had to undress because they had been pushed into the pool.

details.output: Vincent broke his lamp with his bare hand while playing with his cat and a ribbon.
details.ground_truth: Vincent's new lamp should be ready to be picked up on Tuesday.

details.output: Tobias found Natalie's wallet in her room.
details.ground_truth: Natalie's wallet is in her room.

details.output: Margaret and Evans will meet on the 4th at 10:00 and on the 11th at 11:00. They will discuss the 18th and the 17th, but they will meet on the 14th if Evans is available.
details.ground_truth: Margaret and Evans plan to meet at 10 on 4th and at 11 on 11th. They both are not sure when they will be able to meet next, so they will come up with a date later.

details.output: The agreement is about the Caspian Sea, which will have a special legal status. It will be divided into the seabed and the rest of the area. The seabed is rich in resources, including gas, oil and caviar.
details.ground_truth: In the agreement it was decided that it's neither a sea nor a lake and it will have a special legal status. They will also completely divide the seabed up. It's rich in resources, mostly gas and oil.

details.output: Aimee is looking for Maryam. She tried her number and even went to her home, but she is not there. Soren thinks she might have gone somewhere with her father.
details.ground_truth: Aimee is looking for Maryam.

details.output: Charlie's sister passed her last exam at the university. They want to celebrate and go out tonight.
details.ground_truth: Charlie's sister has passed her last university exam. Charlie and Frank will go out to celebrate that tonight.

details.output: Patricia will call George in an hour.
details.ground_truth: Patricia cannot talk now. George will call her in about an hour.

details.output: Joe invites Pete to come over and watch Deadpool 2 with the guys.
details.ground_truth: Joe is going to watch Deadpool 2 with his fellows and Pete will join them.

details.output: Isabella thanks Betty for sharing her work experience and invites her to do something together.
details.ground_truth: Isabella is grateful to Betty for sharing the information about her work yesterday. Isabella offers Betty her company, should Betty want to do something together.

details.output: Elena and Tom are trying to get Jeffrey's attention, but he can't see them because they are a few meters away from him.
details.ground_truth: Elena is wearing the red jacket and Jeffrey can't see her nor Tom.

details.output: 3 people attended the presentation, but the speaker thinks that a small but interested audience is better than a big but uninterested one.
details.ground_truth: Kate, Milena and Regina's presentation went well. Three people came to listen to them.

details.output: The boss appreciated the decision to dismiss a potential client's request, because he wanted to bring in a competitor of that client as a new client.
details.ground_truth: Bella and Eric dismissed a request of a client. Their boss appreciated the decision. He brings in new clients.

details.output: Jack is going to a dance casting and invites Ryan to join him.
details.ground_truth: Ryan and Jack are going to the casting for a dance show.

details.output: Toni and Sonia are planning to go to San Sebastian. Toni recommends an Airbnb place where she stayed last year. The place is small and the landlady, an old Basque widow, rents a room in the apartment.
details.ground_truth: Sonia is going to San Sebastian in a month. Toni enjoyed her the airbnb place there. Sonia isn't convinced about it and will let Toni know.

details.output: Nathan and Deborah are planning a trip to the forest with their girls, Lucy and Sofie. Nathan will see the dentist after work, Deborah will pick up the girls from school and they will have a quick bite to eat before they leave. Nathan will buy some syrup for travel sickness on his way home from work.
details.ground_truth: Deborah and Nathan want to start packing today as they won't have time tomorrow. They need warm clothes for the girls so Deborah's parents could take them to the forest. Deborah and Nathan want to spend some time alone. They will have a quick bite before their leave. Nathan will be home around 6.

details.output: Ross wants to do karaoke tonight. Chandler is hesitant at first but then agrees.
details.ground_truth: Ross wants to do karaoke. Chandler wants to record it for fun.

details.output: Judy is attracted to jerks. She had a bad experience with Andrew and is not sure about Bruce.
details.ground_truth: Judy thinks she's always attracted to bad guys.

details.output: Kristina is watching America's Top Model on TV. Estefania is also watching it and wants to look like Tyra Banks. Jannette is late and just got home.
details.ground_truth: Kristina, Estefania and Jannette are watching America's Top Model.

details.output: Avril invites Frank to go horse racing with her.
details.ground_truth: Frank will join Avril at the races at the weekend.

details.output: Finn is trying to track his shipment and Jim is helping him.
details.ground_truth: Jim tracks Finn's package number 45678 which will be delivered to him tomorrow.

details.output: Ben and Tom are going to a meeting at 2pm in the Oval Room. They are going to fight and win.
details.ground_truth: Tom will meet Ben in the Oval Room at 2pm and tells him to bring the papers.

details.output: There is a roadblock on the road from the swimming pool to Waitrose. Karen and Peter discuss about it and about a presentation Peter has to do for the repairs team tomorrow.
details.ground_truth: Karen got stuck on the road from the swimming pool to Waitrose so wants Peter to avoid it. Peter is not leaving until 6 as he he has to finish his presentation. Karen will see Peter in a bit.

details.output: Jose, Ricky, and Amanda are excited for the new year and the adventures that come with it.
details.ground_truth: Jose Ricky and Amanda are very enthusiastic about the new year as they will travel a lot during the summer of 2019.

details.output: Jen is fed up with her boyfriend and wants to tell him to move out. He owes her money and refuses to pay her back. Jane is supportive and tells Jen to cut her losses and move on.
details.ground_truth: Jen is about to break up with her boyfriend. Jane knew from the beginning that they were not a good match. Jane is going to support Jen.

details.output: William is in a long line and can't come back yet. Emma is waiting for him.
details.ground_truth: William is coming back in 5 minutes as he had to queue for 20 minutes.

details.output: Marta thinks Jay is a pathological liar because he talks about having a lot of money and traveling, but it turns out he actually lives in a small studio apartment.
details.ground_truth: Randy has been lying about being rich and travelling around the world, as he lives in a studio apartment in the suburbs.

details.output: Claire and Aaron are discussing the conference about relations at school. Aaron is giving two lectures and is also a host. Claire is thinking of attending Jo's workshop on teamwork and also a mindfulness workshop.
details.ground_truth: Aaron will give two lectures during the conference about relations at school at the Sesame Street. Claire will participate in mindfulness workshop.

details.output: Ann is congratulating Sue and Julie on something, probably an exam or a test.
details.ground_truth: Ann, Sue and Julie did a great job and they will have a little celebration tonight.

details.output: David wants to get a new tattoo but is unsure what to get. Mike suggests that David's idea of a skull and rose is common and offers to go get a tattoo with him when he comes up with something more personal.
details.ground_truth: David wants to get a new tattoo but he doesn't know what exactly yet.

details.output: John and Andrew talk about a game where players from around the world battle each other in tank squadrons. Andrew compares it to World of Warcraft (WoW) where a player with a lot of experience can kill a new player instantly. Brett shares a story about his cousin meeting his wife in WoW. Andrew talks about his favourite genre, RPGs, and mentions the Final Fantasy series. He shares a story about the series and Andrew's friends tease him about not knowing about it.
details.ground_truth: Brett's cousin met his wife while playing a game together. Andrew's favorite game is the Final Fantasy. Brett and John haven't heard about it.

details.output: Dima's laptop is broken because the cat spilled coffee on it. Nada lends Dima her laptop for two days.
details.ground_truth: Dima's laptop is broken, as her cat spilled coffee on the laptop. Dima is worried, because she has to deliver a translation for Trados tomorrow. Dima will come to Nada in an hour to borrow Nada's laptop.

details.output: Josie thinks that Foucault's Pendulum is weird and nerdy. Stefano defends the book and its author, Umberto Eco. Josie mentions that Salman Rushdie hated the book and called it a computer game. Stefano and Josie have a funny exchange about the phrase "de gustibus non est disputandum" (there is no accounting for taste).
details.ground_truth: Josie finds Eco's novel "Foucault's Pendulum" nerdy. Josie would like to read Eco in Italian, but she's unsure of her language abilities. Stefano considers Eco's two novels and finds them difficult. Josie has read an unfavorable review of "Foucault's Pendulum" by Salman Rushdie.

details.output: Fiona is asking Tina for help with making a tart. Tina is flattered and agrees to help. Fiona has already bought the crust and made a mistake with the filling by adding too many eggs.
details.ground_truth: Fiona wants to prepare dinner for Chris. She is thinking of Tina's tart. She will help her make it.

details.output: Ewan has graduated and his uncle Jayson is congratulating him.
details.ground_truth: Uncle Jayson is pleased with Ewan's graduation.

details.output: Bobby is annoyed with pharmaceutical companies because they invent illnesses and sell them as medical products. He found out that a particular illness he saw in a commercial does not exist and is actually just a mint being sold as a medical product.
details.ground_truth: Bobby's most annoyed by pharmaceutical companies. He believes they invent diseases to make money. He discovered that one company is selling mints as medicine for an illness that doesn't exist.

details.output: Adele is still listening to a song that Kode recommended her. Kode has had the song in his music library for 3 years. Kode will come to Adele's home to give her the whole album on a USB stick.
details.ground_truth: Adele is still listening to the song which Code recommended. Kode will come to Adele's home today and will give her the whole album of the same singer.

details.output: David is talking to Victor about Chris's company. Victor has taken over Chris's company and is letting him work as the director. Victor has sold off the old office and is letting Chris use the space in his own office. David is grateful for what Victor is doing and thinks the market will get better by the end of the year.
details.ground_truth: Victor took over Chris's company, which was under a huge debt. He sold the office and did some changes but Chris still works there as Director. David's business goes very slow but he expects it to get better by the end of the year.

details.output: Pegah will be late back home, working from 17:00 to 21:30. Miriam invited some people over and was hoping Pegah could be there too.
details.ground_truth: Pegah is in class till 15:00. She will work from 17:00 till around 21:30. She will be back at 22:00. Miriam invited people over and wants Pegah to come. Pegah will have a cup of tea with her when she gets back. Miriam will save Pegah some wine.

details.output: Steffen is unable to walk due to a twisted ankle and needs a ride to the infinity pool. Irene and Dan offer to give him a lift, but Irene warns that the car may not make it up the hill. Steffen declines, but Irene is disappointed. Luke and Ben discuss the location of the infinity pool, which is at Vistas de Olas.
details.ground_truth: Steffen twisted his ankle yesterday and needs a lift to the infinity pool. Irene's car probably won't make it up the hill, so they'd have to park at the bottom and hike up. Mr.Budd should make it up the hill since it's a 4-wheel drive.

details.output: Jeremih is having a problem with his sister. Hansel is not going to get involved in the issue.
details.ground_truth: Hansel will tell his sis to text Jeremih back.

details.output: Katy, Ana and Carlton are going to see a film by Lola Arias. Carlton is interested in the subject of the film. They are meeting at Ana's place for an early dinner/drinks and then they will grab an Uber.
details.ground_truth: Katy and Ana invite Carlton to join them for a movie by Lola Arias on the making of the play he had seen. He will come to their place earlier on Saturday.

details.output: Carl is participating in a championship and Duncan is going to watch him. Carl is using a new gearbox this year.
details.ground_truth: Carl will compete in championship this year. Duncan can't miss this event. Carl will register his family members as VIP.

details.output: Emma is not feeling well and doesn't want Will to cook dinner. She will be home soon and Will will pick her up if she needs it.
details.ground_truth: Emma will be home soon and she will let Will know.

details.output: Marcus will pick Mark up from the airport in Sydney on Thursday at 4 p.m.
details.ground_truth: Marcus will pick Mark from the airport at 4pm. Anna will call Mark and give him Marcus' number.

details.output: Inez is planning a food evening and invites her friends to join. They discuss the details of the next food evening, which will be in a new Korean restaurant.
details.ground_truth: Patrycja and Inez enjoyed the Italian evening. Gosia chose a great place. Alicja hasn't been to the new restaurant. They all want a Korean evening on Wednesday in two weeks time.

details.output: Linda missed the train and the return ticket to Amsterdam cost 80 euros.
details.ground_truth: Linda missed her train and the next one is in one hour. A return to Amsterdam was 80 euros.

details.output: Daniel and Missy will have drinks after dinner.
details.ground_truth: Daniel will see Missy after 6 for drinks.

details.output: Kaylin is making fun of a picture of Cynthia that appears when you type her name in a search engine. Amir is also laughing and says he doesn't feel like tomorrow.
details.ground_truth: Kaylin has set her alarm for tomorrow.

details.output: Alex wants to buy milk, but Martin has just bought two yesterday. He will buy two more in a couple of hours.
details.ground_truth: Martin will get Alex two bottles of milk after he finishes the project.

details.output: Jamie is sick with a high fever and a terrible cough. Helen knows a good pediatrician, Dr. Tornez, who treats every case individually. Linda wants to know if there was any important news concerning the school trip, but it's off because half of the class is sick.
details.ground_truth: Jack had to miss school because he is sick. Jamie was sick a lot last year but he got better thanks to doctor Tornez at City Medical Centre, next to the mall. Linda learns the school trip has been cancelled as many students are sick.

details.output: Jamilla reminds Kiki that the audition starts at 7:30 PM. Yoyo says "roger that" which is a military term for "message received".
details.ground_truth: The audition starts at 7.30 P.M. in Antena 3.

details.output: Mike wants to get John's new number. Ann suggests he should ask Mary.
details.ground_truth: Mike will ask Mary for John's new number.

details.output: Parker and Jason are talking about the Arrowverse and the DC Universe. They both prefer the DC Universe over the Marvel Universe.
details.ground_truth: Parker and Jason both prefer DC Universe to Marvel. Jason is still downloading the latest episode of Arrow season 7.

details.output: Helen has forgotten to take her laptop to work and she needs it for a presentation.
details.ground_truth: Helen has left her laptop at home and needs it for the presentation today. Debbie will bring it to Helen's work.

details.output: Matt needs to use the internet connection at home, but he can't remember what it is. Nick suggests he just use his mobile service.
details.ground_truth: Nick will let Matt know when he remembers what their internet connection is.

details.output: Harry sent Jacob a song 3 days ago and Jacob forgot to listen to it. Harry is teasing him about it.
details.ground_truth: Jacob hasn't listened to the song Harry sent him 3 days ago. Jacob will do it later tonight and let Harry know what he thinks.

details.output: Adelle is supposed to clean the hamster cage after school, but she is making excuses for not doing it.
details.ground_truth: Adelle has to clean the hamster cage after school.

details.output: Adam is worried about his friend May, who is depressed and doesn't want to see anyone. Karen agrees that it's serious and suggests that May should see a specialist, but May doesn't want to. Adam and Karen will ask for advice from Karen's friend, a psychologist.
details.ground_truth: Adam and Karen are worried that May suffers from depression. Karen will call her friend who is a psychologist and ask for advice.

details.output: Erin is coming to meet Ashley at the camp, probably at the restaurant area.
details.ground_truth: Erin will meet Ashley in the restaurant for the interview.

details.output: Lilly will be late, but Gabriel will order food for her so that she can get it as soon as she arrives.
details.ground_truth: Lilly will be late. Gabriel will order pasta with salmon and basil for her.

details.output: Kathy and Olivia are talking about getting a haircut. Kathy is going to get her hair cut a bit shorter.
details.ground_truth: Kathy had her hair cut.

details.output: Celine and Mia are talking about a fun time they had on the ice rink. Celine and Mark are both first time skaters.
details.ground_truth: Celine and Mark went skating, it's the first time for Mark.

details.output: Robert will help Pam with Tom's birthday preparations by picking up the balloons from a store in the city centre.
details.ground_truth: Robert will pick up floating balloons for Tom's birthday.

details.output: Adam has a juicy gossip about Iga and her boyfriend. They had to cancel their weekend getaway because he couldn't change the date of the presentation. Iga is angry with him.
details.ground_truth: Iga and her boyfriend are not sitting together since Monday, because they had to cancel their weekend getaway. It made Iga very angry. Iga's boyfriend failed to convince a group to change the date of the presentation.

details.output: Corbin wants to report school violence in his school, Jungang high school. He is afraid that if he is found out, he will be hit as well. Dimitri offers to help him and calls him to reassure him.
details.ground_truth: Corbin reported to the department in charge of school violence that his friend has been beaten.

details.output: Jenny's credit card was left at the shop and Mary is letting her know.
details.ground_truth: Jenny has left her credit car at the Mary's shop.

details.output: Simon and Freddy will collaborate on the school concert. Freddy will send Simon three backing tracks and Simon will try to play guitar for one or two of them.
details.ground_truth: Freddy will sing at the school concert and send Simon 3 backing tracks.

details.output: Millie is sick and won't be coming today.
details.ground_truth: Millie is sick, so she won't come today.

details.output: Oscar and Payne are going to meet at Tristano's for a coffee in half an hour.
details.ground_truth: Payne and Oscar will have a coffee at Tristano's in half an hour.

details.output: Anna is excited about the Muse concert in Cracow and wants to go with Molly.
details.ground_truth: Molly and Anna will go to the Muse concert in Cracow.

details.output: Sean thinks he is a tortoise, his friend Tiffany thinks he might be haunted.
details.ground_truth: Sean believes his spirit animal is a tortoise and Tiffany's could be a wasp.

details.output: Gina asked Warren if he locked the door and he said yes.
details.ground_truth: Warren locked the door.

details.output: Jason and Dory are making a video. Dory's friend is coming over in a week.
details.ground_truth: Jason wants to meet Dory over the weekend. Dory's friend is going to stay with her for a week. Jason has been working on a movie with Lucy for the past two months. Jason bought a video-creator app.

details.output: Susan had a great date with a man who took her to a rollerskating disco.
details.ground_truth: Susan went on a date to the rollerskating disco and she enjoyed it. Jill doesn't find it exciting.

details.output: Samuel and Tim are talking on the phone. Samuel is calling Tim "Anna" because in his language, "Anna" means "elder brother". Tim is a girl's name in his language. Samuel is from South East India and speaks Telugu. He is 35 years old and Tim is 55.
details.ground_truth: Samuel's language is Telugu, which is spoken in south east India. It has nearly 90 million speakers; it's written left to right; it's based on Brahmin script. Teluguland has 23 provinces. It's quite poor. "Anna" means "elder brother" and Thammu or Thammadu - "younger brother". Tim's 55, Samuel's 35.

details.output: 8000 fans showed up for a meet and greet with James Charles in Birmingham. The British media made a big fuss about it and some of them didn't even know who James Charles is.
details.ground_truth: There was a meet-and-greet with James Charles in Birmingham which gathered 8000  people.

details.output: Hannah is watching the game, but James is going to work.
details.ground_truth: James is heading to work so he's not watching the game.

details.output: Jennifer, Jack and Reece are going to watch the movie Mad Max on Netflix tomorrow evening.
details.ground_truth: Jennifer, Jack and Reece will match the latest Mad Max on Netflix tomorrow evening. Jack has already seen it.

details.output: Allison has received a scholarship and is very happy about it. Maya and Sarah are also happy and want to celebrate with her.
details.ground_truth: Allison has got a scholarship.

details.output: Scott is being teased by his friends Ethan, Toby and Marshall.
details.ground_truth: Ethan, Toby and Marshall are making fun of Scott.

details.output: Lisa will be back home before 11 pm.
details.ground_truth: Lisa isn't going home yet. Daisy wants her to be back before 11 p.m.

details.output: Adam is nervous about an exam and Dave is trying to reassure him.
details.ground_truth: Adam is going to take an exam in ten minutes.

details.output: Kirsten is going to post a vote on insurance. Larry will help her with it. Kirsten will get her husband to sign off on it. Kirsten will take input from Jamie and John. Kirsten and Larry think that the current BoD has ignored them. Kirsten and Larry think that legal action is the only thing the current BoD understands. Kirsten and Larry will put a menorah in the lobby next year.
details.ground_truth: Larry has to read the E-mail again and make a decision with Kirsten afterwards. Kirsten has to convince her husband. Kirsten wants to include Jamie and John. Larry and Kirsten are going to arrange menorah in the lobby.

details.output: James and Mia are going to an art exhibition tomorrow. Mia is a bit stressed about it because she doesn't know Amelia well. James reassures her that Amelia is nice and laid-back.
details.ground_truth: James and Mia want to go to an art exhibition tomorrow. James wants Amelia to go with them but Mia isn't sure about it. James and Mia will go to his place afterwards.

details.output: Lauren is still needed for work tomorrow. The manager will be back and may do more work. Lauren will tell Pam about her holiday tomorrow.
details.ground_truth: Pam doesn't have rota for Lauren, but Manager may give Lauren more tomorrow. Pam and Lauren will meet tomorrow and discuss Lauren's holiday.

details.output: Albert passed the driving exam on his 4th attempt.
details.ground_truth: Albert has passed his driving test on the 4th attempt.

details.output: Harris's friend Aoki died yesterday. Harris is not sure what happened yet.
details.ground_truth: Harris' friend, Aoki, who lives in Michigan, died yesterday. Harris hasn't seen her for a few months.

details.output: Nathan wants to buy a bike in the spring. Aubrey is concerned about where he will keep it. Nathan has a stationary bike to stay in shape during the winter.
details.ground_truth: Nathan is planning on buying a bike in spring. He will probably store the bike on some special hooks because his apartment is small. Nathan has also bought a stationary bike to keep fit.

details.output: Rachel got a new cat, a Siamese, named Portia. She is allergic to cats and is taking medication to help with the symptoms.
details.ground_truth: Rachel has a new siamese cat, a girl called Portia. Rachel discovered that is allergic to cats. She is sneezing, has rashes and other allergic reactions. She takes medications that seem to help. Adam consoles Rachel.

details.output: Gino is trying to decide what to wear to go out. Renee advises him to wear a white shirt with blue trousers and brown shoes.
details.ground_truth: Gino wants Renee’s advice on what to wear. She gives some hints so that he doesn't look like a waiter and recommends wearing black pants, a white shirt and brown shoes.

details.output: Amelia is not telling Emily her favourite colour.
details.ground_truth: Emily's favorite color is blue. Amelia can't talk about the reason behind her question with Emily.

details.output: Benjamin is tired and wants to take a nap. He is considering changing his mind about meeting Hilary and the others at 2 pm. They are going to meet at the entrance to the conference hall and then head to La Cantina for Italian food.
details.ground_truth: Hilary has the keys to the apartment. Benjamin wants to get them and go take a nap. Hilary is having lunch with some French people at La Cantina. Hilary is meeting them at the entrance to the conference hall at 2 pm. Benjamin and Elliot might join them. They're meeting for the drinks in the evening.

details.output: Jane had a severe allergic reaction to a cake at La Perle. She told the staff she was allergic to peanuts, but they assured her it was safe. The cake had crushed nuts in the crust, which caused Jane's reaction.
details.ground_truth: Jane, Anne and Ella have been to La Perle. Jane ate cheesecake and got an allergic reaction. They are getting out of ER.

details.output: Jane is running late and will meet Alex at the left entrance. She has the file with the xerox copies.
details.ground_truth: Jane will be about 10 minutes late. Alex is waiting at the left entrance and they are going to attend a meeting. This might be the last opportunity for Jane and Alex to get through to them.

details.output: Kane recommends Shannon to listen to the new 30 seconds to mars album.
details.ground_truth: Kane recommends the new 30 Seconds to Mars album to Shannon.

details.output: Callan's Samsung S8 has a black screen and overheats. Wade advises him to be careful with the battery and to take it to the store to see if it's still under warranty.
details.ground_truth: Callan's Samsung S8 overheats, so he's going to the store to get it repaired.

details.output: Maya asks Boris to bring home the clothes that are hanging outside. Boris is not home and tells Maya that he will ask Brian to take care of it.
details.ground_truth: Maya wants Boris to bring clothes that are hanging outside. Brian will do that, because Boris isn't at home now.

details.output: Jane and Steven are planning to meet at 4:30 instead of 5. They are driving 300km and Steven says it will take only 2 hours with the new road.
details.ground_truth: Jane wants to leave at 4.30 instead of 5 because Google Maps suggests the 300 km drive should take them at least 3 hours and she doesn't want to be late. She will wait for Steven at the main entrance.

details.output: Ray is locked out of his room. Max finds it funny and helps him by asking his roommates to let him in.
details.ground_truth: Ray is locked in the room from the outside and he has to pee. Max's roommate will come and let him out.

details.output: Abigail doesn't want to take a stroll with Emma and the little ones because the air quality is bad.
details.ground_truth: Abigail is not going to take a stroll with the little ones. Her smog alert app is showing that the norms have been exceeded by 30% today.

details.output: Chloe's mom, Lesley, wants her to come home and let the dog out after school. Chloe had already made plans to go to Megan's house, but Lesley says she can go there afterwards after she lets the dog out.
details.ground_truth: Somebody has to take the dog out. Chloe wants to go to Megan tonight and the father has to work late tonight. Chloe will have to come back home to let the dog out and then she can see Megan.

details.output: Emily broke one of Linda's green tea cups. Linda is not upset and offers Emily the whole set of green tea cups.
details.ground_truth: Emily's a guest at Linda's house. She broke one of Linda's green tea cups when she was cleaning the cupboards. Linda doesn't like them and she offers Emily the whole set.

details.output: Sean overslept again.
details.ground_truth: Sean overslept again.

details.output: Ben and Emma are on a bus, and Emma is taking a nap in a free seat at the back of the bus. They are going to New York and are expected to arrive around 4.30 PM, but traffic may be a problem.
details.ground_truth: Emma is about to take a nap in the back of the bus to New York. Ben and Emma will be there around 4.30 pm. Ben will wake Emma up 15 minutes prior to their arrival.

details.output: Mike and Celia are planning a holiday. They are considering going to Croatia.
details.ground_truth: Mike considers going to Egypt for holiday. It's too hot for Celia, she suggests Croatia instead. Mark likes the idea, he's never been there.

details.output: Jason was absent today. Nathan and Susy told Megan that he had a dental appointment.
details.ground_truth: Jason had a dental appointment today and that's why he was absent.

details.output: Max's sister is studying in Shanghai, which has a population of 25 million. Rory thinks that speaking Chinese is a good investment as there are many Chinese people around the world.
details.ground_truth: Max's sister is studying in Shanghai and she already speaks Chinese. She doesn't find the whole experience amazing but she believes it's a good investment.

details.output: Maddie is at Asda. John wants her to buy white bread and apples (Gala variety).
details.ground_truth: Maddie will buy a white bread and apples on John's request.

details.output: Ana wants to visit her grandma tomorrow. Catherine will call her when she wakes up.
details.ground_truth: Ana wants to visit grandma tomorrow. Catherine will go with her. She will call Anna when she wakes up.

details.output: Ron sent Josh an email.
details.ground_truth: Josh should check the email from Ron.

details.output: Mary stayed at home today.
details.ground_truth: Today Mary didn't go to school, she stayed at home.

details.output: Lucy is not interested in dating Johny. She wants to go to the gig with her best friends, Maggie and the others. They will meet at Lucy's house at 6 pm to pamper themselves before the gig.
details.ground_truth: Johny wants to go for a gig with Lucy. She prefers to go with Maggie and her best friends. They will meet at 6 PM at her house to prepare for the evening. The gig starts at 8 PM.

details.output: Dave is looking for Nicky, but she is not at Sam's place anymore.
details.ground_truth: Nicky has just left Sam's place. Her phone is off.
